prose.en: {param:sc-41_odp.02} disable or remove {param:sc-41_odp.01} on the following systems or system components: {param:sc-41_odp.03}.

guidance.en: Connection ports include Universal Serial Bus (USB), Thunderbolt, and Firewire (IEEE 1394). Input/output (I/O) devices include compact disc and digital versatile disc drives. Disabling or removing such connection ports and I/O devices helps prevent the exfiltration of information from systems and the introduction of malicious code from those ports or devices. Physically disabling or removing ports and/or devices is the stronger action.

objects.en: procedures addressing port and input/output device access
system configuration settings and associated documentation
list of connection ports or input/output devices to be physically disabled or removed on systems or system components
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel installing, configuring, and/or maintaining the system
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing the disabling of connection ports or input/output devices

guidelines.en: connection ports or input/output devices to be disabled or removed are defined;
systems or system components with connection ports or input/output devices to be disabled or removed are defined;
